exception_info.exception_message:
Command failed (exit 1): set -o pipefail; echo '# Care Management Handoff — Ms. Yazzie

Ms. Yazzie is a 69-year-old female in the behavioral-health care management intake queue. The referral came from her PCP for care management related to major depression, documented severe PHQ-9 scores, cost-related antidepressant underuse, and behavioral-health follow-up needs recorded in the chart. Complete intake, outreach, assessment, and care-plan work through to a finalized care plan.

## 🧰 Workspace

| Resource | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Patient data & care-manager tools | `healthverse` MCP server |
| Handbook | `/workspace/skills/managed-care-operations-handbook/SKILL.md` |
| Working files | `/logs/artifacts/workspaces/<case-id>/care-manager/` |
| Shared handoff | `/logs/artifacts/workspaces/<case-id>/shared/` |
| Tool reference | `/opt/healthverse-task-assets/tool_reference.md` |

## 📋 Rules

- Use only care-manager namespaces: `cm_intake`, `cm_chart`, `cm_outreach`, `cm_assessment`, `cm_care_plan`
- Do not inspect simulator source, tests, solution, or expectations files
- Do not fabricate evidence — every structured field must be grounded in the chart or the outreach transcript
- Mark `consent_obtained` true only after the consent script was actually performed in the transcript
' > /tmp/instruction.md && echo '{"mcpServers": {"healthverse": {"type": "http", "url": "http://healthverse-server:8200/mcp"}}}' > /tmp/mcp_config.json && deepagents --stdin -n '' -M openrouter:deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro --mcp-config /tmp/mcp_config.json -y -S all -q --no-stream < /tmp/instruction.md 2>&1 | tee /logs/agent/run_log.txt; DEEPAGENTS_EXIT=$?; python /opt/healthverse/deepagents_dump_thread.py --output /logs/agent/deepagents_thread.json 1>>/logs/agent/run_log.txt 2>>/logs/agent/run_log.txt || true; exit $DEEPAGENTS_EXIT
